headline: Declassified Pentagon Files Put GE Aerospace Research In Investor Focus
summary: Declassified Pentagon files on advanced unidentified aerial phenomena have been released, highlighting unusual propulsion, maneuverability, and materials characteristics. The disclosures are drawing fresh investor attention to propulsion, power systems, and materials science, areas that sit at the core of GE Aerospace within General Electric (NYSE:GE). The timing has renewed discussion about how existing aerospace research programs could intersect with emerging defense and aerospace...
